error_signature: Compare Dataset node not comparing properly
title: Compare Dataset node fails to compare identical inputs
symptom: The Compare Dataset node shows that items in both inputs are only in their respective sets, despite being identical.
root_cause: The Compare Dataset node requires the correct key to be specified for comparison. If the value is used instead of the key, the node will not function as intended, leading to incorrect comparison results.
fix_steps: Open the Compare Dataset node settings
Re-run the workflow to check the comparison results
agent_instruction: Use the correct key for comparison in the Compare Dataset node settings.
